system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Leg Strike
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You bound into the air, kicking furiously and carrying yourself further with each kick. This allows you to kick multiple enemies, using each strike to carry you forward through the air. As long as there are enemies before you, separated by only five feet per Rank of Qinggong, you may continue to Attack and move until you fail. These are normal kicks. For example, if you have two Ranks in Qinggong, and succeed on your first Attack against an enemy within ten feet, then you may Attack another foe provided they are also within ten feet. If you land your Attack on the second foe, then you may continue and Attack another target provided it is within ten feet. If your Qinggong were Rank 3, then this minimum distance would be 15 feet. Cathartic: When used Cathartically you can continue to Attack as long as there are enemies before you, separated by only ten feet per Rank of Qinggong.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically you can continue to Attack as long as there are enemies before you, separated by only ten feet per Rank of Qinggong.
